title: Livspace Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Livspace Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Livspace Capital India:
Livspace Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace Capital India!
